name: Mistral AI API
what_it_does: French AI company offering efficient, open-weight LLM models with strong performance-to-cost ratio. Mistral Large (flagship), Mistral Small, and specialized models for code, math, and embeddings via API and self-hosting.
use_cases: Cost-efficient LLM inference for high-volume agent applications
European data residency-compliant AI for GDPR-sensitive workflows
Open-weight model deployment for on-premises or VPC agent infrastructure
Function calling and tool use for agentic workflows
Code generation with Codestral (specialized coding model)
not_for: Applications needing the very largest context windows (vs Claude/Gemini)
Organizations that need US-only data residency
best_when: An agent needs high-quality, cost-efficient LLM capabilities with European data sovereignty, open-weight model options, or strong coding performance via Codestral.
avoid_when: You need multimodal capabilities or very large context windows (>32K).

auth.notes: Simple API key as Bearer token. OpenAI-compatible API format — can use OpenAI SDK with Mistral base URL. Very easy for agent migration from OpenAI. No OAuth required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial credits on signup; community plan for open models
pricing.paid_tiers: Mistral Large ~$3/1M input, $9/1M output; Mistral Small ~$1/1M input, $3/1M output
pricing.notes: Very competitive pricing, especially for Mistral Small and Mini. Free trial available without credit card. Open-weight models can be self-hosted for zero API cost. Codestral is free for individual use.

performance.rate_limits: Variable by plan; free tier limited, paid tier generous

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OpenAI-compatible error format. Errors include type, message, and param fields. Standard HTTP status codes. Documentation is clear and accurate. Rate limit errors include Retry-After.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Stateless generation API — retrying has no side effects. Non-deterministic outputs but no idempotency concerns.
known_agent_gotchas: OpenAI compatibility is good but not 100% — some OpenAI-specific features may not work
Model names differ from OpenAI naming — agents must be configured with Mistral model names
Function calling format is similar but has subtle differences from OpenAI's tool use format
Context window varies by model — Mistral Small has 32K, Large has 128K
System prompts behave differently from some other providers — test prompt engineering carefully
La Plateforme vs Le Chat have different APIs — ensure using the right endpoint for agents
